title: Magnuson Park Swimming Beach - Parks | seattle.gov
content: # Magnuson Park Swimming Beach. Magnuson Park has a public swim beach on the shore of Lake Washington, boasting excellent views of the water and landscape all the way to Mt. Rainier. To reach the beach, enter the park on NE 65th St. and turn left at the stop sign. Follow the road all the way to the end (near the Fin Art sculpture garden). There is a parking lot at the end of the road, as well as parking along Lake Shore Dr. Magnuson beach has restrooms, including an outdoor shower. There is a fixed swim platform; however, the water depth at this site does not allow for a diving board. **Please be aware, parking near the swim beach will operate the same hours as the Magnuson Park Boat Ramp. The parking gate serving E1, E2, E3, and E4 is locked at 10pm nightly and reopens at 6am.**. Mailing Address: 100 Dexter Ave N, Seattle, WA, 98109. Phone: (206) 684-4075 684-4075). Fax: (206) 615-1813 615-1813). Email: pks\_info@seattle.gov.

title: Seattle Off-Leash Dog Park Review: Magnuson
content: The path down to the beach gets you exercise along with your dog and the view from the beach is wonderful. There are a lot of other dogs to play
